"use client" import { useState } from "react" import { Link } from "react-router-dom" import { Calendar, Clock, User, Eye, Heart } from "lucide-react" const BlogCard = ({ post }) => { const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false) return (
setIsHovered(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setIsHovered(false)} > {/* Background Image */}
{/* Category Badge */}
{post.category}
{/* Title Overlay */}

{post.title}

{/* Content */}

{post.description}

{/* Meta Information */}
{post.author.name}
{new Date(post.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}
{post.readTime}
{/* Tags */}
{post.tags.slice(0, 3).map((tag, index) => ( {tag} ))}
{/* Stats and Read More */}
{post.views}
{post.likes}
Read More →
{/* Hover Popup */} {isHovered && (

{post.title}

{post.description}

By {post.author.name} {post.readTime}
{post.views} views {post.likes} likes
{post.tags.map((tag, index) => ( {tag} ))}
)}
) } export default BlogCard
